_doc: Current risk phase for the graduated sizing ladder (CHARTER rail 3). Computer owns this. Advances on closed-trade track record; regresses if expectancy turns negative or calibration decays.
next_phase_gate: ≥5 closed trades with positive expectancy -> Phase 1 (single 30% / option 30% / cash floor 20%)
rationale: Zero closed trades. Start measured, earn the right to scale. Mandate is aggression but confidence must be earned, not assumed.
